name_cn:
Cannes Bag #️⃣M43986
Exclusive global launch! This item is custom-made according to Chanel's French production specifications with dynamic chip re-coding, original factory materials, and original factory light gold electroplated full steel hardware (color matches authentic)
Please compare with the authentic French version!
We ensure 100% authenticity! Original factory materials, hardware, edge oil, stitching + authentic craftsmanship + official website latest gift box!
15 x 17 x 15 cm
(Length x Height x Width)
Monogram and Monogram Reverse coated canvas exterior
Calfskin trim
Microfiber lining
Metal hardware
Semi-rigid construction
Reliable zip closure
Strap: Removable, adjustable
Strap half-length: 48.0 cm
Strap half-length adjustable to: 53.0 cm
Handle: Single handle
Made in France
